query:
WITH
    hauls_with_and_without_user_haul_matches AS (
        SELECT
            t.trip_id,
            JSONB_AGG(
                JSONB_BUILD_OBJECT(
                    'haul_id',
                    h.haul_id,
                    'trip_id',
                    t.trip_id,
                    'catch_locations',
                    h.catch_locations,
                    'gear_group_id',
                    h.gear_group_id,
                    'gear_id',
                    h.gear_id,
                    'species_group_ids',
                    h.species_group_ids,
                    'fiskeridir_vessel_id',
                    h.fiskeridir_vessel_id,
                    'haul_distance',
                    COALESCE(h.haul_distance, u.distance),
                    'start_latitude',
                    COALESCE(h.start_latitude, u.start_latitude),
                    'start_longitude',
                    COALESCE(h.start_longitude, u.start_longitude),
                    'stop_latitude',
                    h.stop_latitude,
                    'stop_longitude',
                    h.stop_longitude,
                    'start_timestamp',
                    LOWER(h.period),
                    'stop_timestamp',
                    UPPER(h.period),
                    'vessel_length_group',
                    h.vessel_length_group,
                    'catches',
                    h.catches,
                    'vessel_name',
                    COALESCE(h.vessel_name, h.vessel_name_ers),
                    'call_sign',
                    COALESCE(h.vessel_call_sign, h.vessel_call_sign_ers),
                    'config',
                    u.config,
                    'start_fuel_liter',
                    u.start_fuel_liter,
                    'end_fuel_liter',
                    u.end_fuel_liter
                )
            ) AS hauls
        FROM
            trips_detailed t
            INNER JOIN hauls h ON h.haul_id = ANY (t.haul_ids)
            LEFT JOIN user_hauls u ON u.haul_id = h.haul_id
        WHERE
            t.trip_id = ANY ($1::BIGINT[])
        GROUP BY
            t.trip_id
    ),
    user_hauls_without_matching_hauls AS (
        SELECT
            uh.trip_id,
            JSONB_AGG(
                JSONB_BUILD_OBJECT(
                    'haul_id',
                    NULL,
                    'trip_id',
                    uh.trip_id,
                    'catch_locations',
                    '[]'::JSONB,
                    'gear_group_id',
                    NULL,
                    'gear_id',
                    uh.gear_id,
                    'species_group_ids',
                    '[]'::JSONB,
                    'fiskeridir_vessel_id',
                    uh.fiskeridir_vessel_id,
                    'haul_distance',
                    uh.distance,
                    'start_latitude',
                    uh.start_latitude,
                    'start_longitude',
                    uh.start_longitude,
                    'stop_latitude',
                    NULL,
                    'stop_longitude',
                    NULL,
                    'start_timestamp',
                    uh.start_ts,
                    'stop_timestamp',
                    uh.end_ts,
                    'vessel_length_group',
                    NULL,
                    'catches',
                    '[]'::JSONB,
                    'vessel_name',
                    NULL,
                    'call_sign',
                    uh.call_sign,
                    'config',
                    uh.config,
                    'start_fuel_liter',
                    uh.start_fuel_liter,
                    'end_fuel_liter',
                    uh.end_fuel_liter
                )
            ) AS hauls
        FROM
            user_hauls uh
        WHERE
            uh.trip_id = ANY ($1::BIGINT[])
        GROUP BY
            uh.trip_id
    ),
    merged AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(h.trip_id, u.trip_id) AS trip_id,
            JSONB_AGG(
                e.elem
                ORDER BY
                    (e.elem ->> 'start_timestamp')::TIMESTAMPTZ
            ) AS hauls
        FROM
            hauls_with_and_without_user_haul_matches h
            FULL OUTER JOIN user_hauls_without_matching_hauls u ON u.trip_id = h.trip_id
            CROSS JOIN LATERAL JSONB_ARRAY_ELEMENTS(
                COALESCE(h.hauls, '[]') || COALESCE(u.hauls, '[]')
            ) AS e (elem)
        GROUP BY
            COALESCE(h.trip_id, u.trip_id)
    )
UPDATE trips_detailed t
SET
    ers_and_user_hauls = m.hauls
FROM
    merged m
WHERE
    m.trip_id = t.trip_id;
